svg.text: • Builds DAG (needs:) • Queues jobs to runners
PyPI • npm • Maven • Generic packages • release: tag
Polls GitLab API · claims jobs · sends logs
All scanners produce: gl-sast-report.json / gl-dast-report.json → parsed by GitLab
MR widget shows findings · Security Dashboard aggregates · Policies block merges
vulnerability: allows_failure: true (warn) vs false (block pipeline)
Scan Execution Policies · Merge Request Approval Policies (enforced by security team)
Step 7: Alert fires → PagerDuty/Slack → On-call investigates → kubectl rollout undo or GitLab pipeline rollback
Protected: main, staging · MR required · ≥1 approval · Passing pipeline
release/* → cherry-pick hotfixes · environment branches track deployment state
